isolation.note: Read-only site with hardcoded data, no shared mutable state

steps.observed: Page loaded with title 'Meet Chef Kyla | Soul Good'

steps.expected: Hero with eyebrow text, heading, and description
steps.observed: Hero section present with eyebrow 'THE WOMAN BEHIND THE MISSION', heading 'Meet Chef Kyla', descriptive paragraph, and hero image of Chef Kyla
'From Struggle to Purpose' section with detailed narrative about health transformation, including obesity, hypertension reversal, and food-as-medicine journey
'Culinary Education' section describing classical training at premier culinary institution with specialization in Southern and soul food
'Nutrition Certification' section describing certified nutrition specialist with expertise in functional nutrition and anti-inflammatory protocols
'Speaking & Education' section describing wellness conferences, food festivals, and community event speaking
'Southern Soul Food Meets Functional Healing Nutrition' section with 5 pillars: Ancestral Wisdom, Nutrient Density, Eat the Rainbow, Functional Ingredients, Intentional Preparation

steps.action: Verify mobile responsiveness via CSS classes
steps.observed: Component uses md: and lg: breakpoints for typography, grid layouts (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2, sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-5), and spacing

evidence.mobileVerification: CSS class review confirms responsive breakpoints (md:, lg:, sm:) for typography sizing, grid layouts, and spacing. Per AGENTS.md, agent-browser viewport is fixed at 1280x720 so mobile verification is done via CSS class review.

steps.observed: Page loaded with title 'Experiences & Events | Soul Good'
'Pop-Up Dinners by Chef Kyla' section with description of Tastemakers signature series, including guest count (40-50), price range ($120-$200), and event details

steps.action: Verify upcoming events with dates and tickets
steps.expected: Events with dates and ticket links
steps.observed: Two upcoming events displayed: (1) 'Tastemakers: Spring Awakening Dinner' - April 17, 2025, 7:00 PM, $165/person with GET TICKETS link; (2) 'Tastemakers: Soul & Fire' - May 15, 2025, 6:30 PM, $195/person with GET TICKETS link

steps.action: Verify photo gallery from past events
steps.observed: 'Moments from the Table' section with 6 photos from past events: Heritage Table (Feb 2025), Plated Course (Dec 2024), Chef Kyla in Action (Nov 2024), Cocktail Pairings (Oct 2024), Dessert Course (Sep 2024), Communal Table (Aug 2024)

summary: Tested 2 assertions: 2 passed. VAL-ABOUT-001 (Chef Kyla's Story page) renders with hero, transformation narrative, all 3 required credentials (culinary school, nutrition certification, speaking engagements), and 5 philosophy pillars. VAL-ABOUT-002 (Experiences & Events page) renders with pop-up dinner information, 2 upcoming events with dates/pricing/tickets, and a 6-image past events photo gallery.
